name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) designs high-performance and AI computing products including CPUs, GPUs, FPGAs, APUs, DPUs, AI NICs, and adaptive SoCs. AMD serves data center, client computing, gaming, and embedded markets. Key product lines include EPYC server processors, Instinct AI accelerators, Radeon GPUs, Ryzen AI client processors, and Xilinx-derived FPGA/adaptive SoC solutions. AMD also develops software stacks including the open ROCm AI platform and delivers full-stack rack-scale AI infrastructure solutions.

products.name: AMD EPYC Series
products.description: 5th Gen x86 server CPUs for high-performance computing, enterprise IT, supercomputing, and AI data center workloads.

products.name: AMD Instinct MI200/MI300/MI325/MI350 Series
products.description: CDNA-architecture GPU accelerators for AI training, inference, and exascale scientific computing.

products.name: AMD Instinct MI355X
products.description: Next-generation GPU announced for large-scale AI deployments.

products.name: AMD Instinct MI450 Series
products.description: GPU products powering first gigawatt of capacity under the OpenAI product purchase agreement.

products.name: AMD Radeon PRO V Series
products.description: Visual cloud data center GPUs for remote visualization, Desktop-as-a-Service, and Cloud Gaming workloads.

products.name: Virtex, Kintex, Artix, Spartan FPGAs
products.description: FPGA product families for data center acceleration and adaptive computing.

products.name: Zynq and Versal Adaptive SoCs
products.description: Adaptive SoCs for data center and embedded applications with integrated processing capabilities.

products.name: Alveo Accelerator Cards
products.description: Data center acceleration cards providing a platform for accelerated computing workloads.

products.name: AMD Ryzen AI
products.description: Client CPUs/APUs with integrated NPU for AI PCs; first x86 SoC with dedicated NPU for AI workloads.

products.name: AMD ROCm Platform
products.description: Open AI software stack supporting frameworks, large and small language models, AI training and inference.

products.name: Helios AI Rack-Scale Platform
products.description: Rack-scale solution integrating AMD CPUs, GPUs, and networking for AI supercomputer and ML workloads.

products.name: AMD Infinity Fabric Switch
products.description: Networking switch technology positioning AMD as a custom-design silicon provider for AI infrastructure.

products.name: Semi-custom SoCs
products.description: Custom System-on-Chip designs including game console SoCs and other customer-specific solutions.

products.name: AMD DPUs and AI NICs
products.description: Data processing units and AI Network Interface Cards for data center networking and AI workloads.

products.name: Embedded CPUs, APUs, FPGAs, SOMs
products.description: Embedded computing products for automotive, industrial, healthcare, storage, and networking markets.

partnerships.description: Multiyear product purchase agreement for 6 gigawatts of AMD GPU deployment, beginning with MI450 series.
AMD sold ZT Systems' data center infrastructure manufacturing business to Sanmina in October 2025.
Large hyperscale customers, OEMs, and ODMs deployed AMD Instinct MI350X Series GPUs for AI infrastructure.
